properties.name: app.version
properties.description: Application version displayed in API responses and health endpoint.

properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: Base64-encoded HMAC-SHA256 secret used to sign JWT tokens. Must be at least 256 bits in production.

properties.name: app.jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT access-token validity duration in milliseconds. Default: 86400000 (24 hours).

properties.name: app.jwt.refresh-expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT refresh-token validity duration in milliseconds. Default: 604800000 (7 days).

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of origins permitted by CORS policy.

properties.name: membership.pricing.silver
properties.description: Monthly price (INR) for the Silver membership tier.

properties.name: membership.pricing.gold
properties.description: Monthly price (INR) for the Gold membership tier.

properties.name: membership.pricing.platinum
properties.description: Monthly price (INR) for the Platinum membership tier.

properties.name: membership.scheduler.expire-subscriptions
properties.description: Cron expression for the daily job that marks expired subscriptions. Default: 1 AM every day.

properties.name: membership.scheduler.process-renewals
properties.description: Cron expression for the daily auto-renewal processing job. Default: 1:05 AM every day.

properties.name: app.swagger.local-url
properties.description: Base URL used as the local server entry in Swagger/OpenAPI documentation.

properties.name: payments.webhook.secret
properties.description: HMAC-SHA256 secret used to sign and verify payment gateway webhook payloads. Must be changed from the dev default before deploying to production.

properties.name: revenue.recognition.scheduler.enabled
properties.description: Whether the revenue recognition scheduler is active. Disable in dev; enable in production.

properties.name: notifications.webhooks.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum delivery attempts for outbound merchant webhooks before giving up.

properties.name: notifications.webhooks.disable-after-gave-up
properties.description: Number of consecutive gave-up events after which the webhook endpoint is disabled.

properties.name: notifications.webhooks.dispatch-timeout-seconds
properties.description: HTTP connect+read timeout in seconds for outbound webhook dispatch.

properties.name: projections.snapshot.scheduler.enabled
properties.description: Whether the projection snapshot scheduler is active. Disable in dev; enable in production.
